zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybil Corbet於1077年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾阿爾斯特時，她的父親Robert Corbet23歲，母親Adèle d'Alcester21歲。她於1108年之前與Herbert FitzHerbert Lord of Blaen Llyfni, King's Chamberlain在威爾士結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1156年在英國威爾斯波斯布雷孔享年79歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾朋特斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sybil Corbet于1077年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾阿爾斯特时，她的父亲Robert Corbet23岁，母亲Adèle d'Alcester21岁。她于1108年之前与Herbert FitzHerbert Lord of Blaen Llyfni, King's Chamberlain在威尔士结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1156年在英国威尔斯波斯布雷孔享年79岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾朋特斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Sybil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybil Corbet was born in 1077, in Alcester, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Corbet, was 23 and her mother, Adèle d'Alcester, was 21. She married Herbert FitzHerbert Lord of Blaen Llyfni, King's Chamberlain before 1108, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1156, in Brecon, Powys, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 79, and was buried in Pontesbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Blaenllyfni, Brecon, Wales: Brecon, Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sybil Corbet est née en 1077, à Alcester, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Corbet, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Adèle d'Alcester, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Herbert FitzHerbert Lord of Blaen Llyfni, King's Chamberlain avant 1108, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1156, à Brecon, Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Pontesbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sybil Corbet 1077 in Alcester, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Corbet 23 und ihre Mutter Adèle d'Alcester 21. Sie hat vor 1108 in Wales Herbert FitzHerbert Lord of Blaen Llyfni, King's Chamberlain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1156 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Brecon, Powys, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Pontesbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ht.Blaenllyfni, Brecon, Wales: Brecon, Powys, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sybil Corbet è nata il nel 1077 nel Alcester, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert Corbet, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Adèle d'Alcester, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Herbert FitzHerbert Lord of Blaen Llyfni, King's Chamberlain prima del 1108, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1156, nel Brecon, Powys, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolta a Pontesbury, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sybil Corbetが1077年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアルセスターで生まれた時，父Robert Corbetは23歳，母Adèle d'Alcesterは21歳であった。1108年以前にウェールズでHerbert FitzHerbert Lord of Blaen Llyfni, King's Chamberlainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1156年にイギリスウェールズポウイスブレコンで79歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアポンテスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybil Corbet(이)가 1077년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 알스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Corbet(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adèle d'Alcester(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1108년 이전 웨일스에서 Herbert FitzHerbert Lord of Blaen Llyfni, King's Chamberlain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1156년 영국 웨일스 파우이스 브레콘에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 폰츠버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sybil Corbet nasceu em 1077, em Alcester, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Corbet, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Adèle d'Alcester, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Herbert FitzHerbert Lord of Blaen Llyfni, King's Chamberlain antes 1108, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1156, em Brecon, Powys, Gales, United Kingdom, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em Pontesbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybil Corbet родилась в 1077 г. в местности алсестир, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Corbet было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Adèle d'Alcester, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Herbert FitzHerbert Lord of Blaen Llyfni, King's Chamberlain перед 1108 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1156 г. в местности брекон, поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности понтесбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sybil Corbet nació en 1077, en Alcester, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Corbet, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Adèle d'Alcester, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Herbert FitzHerbert Lord of Blaen Llyfni, King's Chamberlain antes de 1108, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1156, en Brecon, Powys, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultada en Pontesbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
